defenses: Provide a payment receipt or mobile app transaction record showing the meter was paid for the cited time period
Document that the meter or pay station was malfunctioning or out of service at the time of the citation
Show that the pay station was inoperable and no alternative payment method was reasonably available
Demonstrate that no parking signs were missing, obscured by overgrowth, or improperly posted
Prove the vehicle was not located within the posted no-parking zone boundaries
Show that temporary signage conflicted with permanent signage, creating ambiguity
Prove the fire lane markings on the pavement were faded, missing, or not clearly visible at the time
Show that posted fire lane signs were absent, damaged, or obstructed
Demonstrate a genuine emergency required a brief temporary stop in the fire lane
Provide documentation of a valid Georgia disabled parking permit or disabled veteran plate in effect at the time
Show the permit was properly displayed in the vehicle but overlooked by the issuing officer
Demonstrate the handicap space was not properly marked with required signage and pavement markings
Show that the vehicle was lawfully parked at a legal curbside location and not obstructing traffic
Demonstrate that a brief stop was necessitated by a documented emergency or loading/unloading with hazard lights
Prove the citation location description does not match the vehicle's actual position at the cited time
Provide a valid City of Atlanta residential parking permit for the cited zone displayed in the vehicle
Show the permit was properly affixed to the windshield but not visible to the officer due to angle or glare
Demonstrate the zone boundary signage was unclear or that the vehicle was parked outside the restricted zone
Provide proof of valid Georgia registration in effect on the date of the citation
Show that the Georgia DMV was processing a renewal application at the time and the delay was beyond your control
Document that the renewal sticker was applied but fell off or was obscured, and provide registration paperwork
Show that posted street cleaning signs were missing, damaged, or did not clearly specify the day and time restrictions
Provide evidence that the vehicle was moved before the street cleaning window began and was re-cited in error
Demonstrate that temporary construction or an event blocked legal parking alternatives in the area
